title: Conditional Code Generation
scenario: Write a Python function that takes two arguments, a list of numbers and a condition (a function that takes a number as input and returns a boolean value). The function should return a new list that includes only the numbers from the original list that satisfy the condition. The function should be able to handle edge cases such as an empty list or a condition that always returns False. Limit the output to 100 lines.

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the code is syntactically correct.
Verify that the function works correctly for different inputs.
Evaluate the readability and maintainability of the code.
